title: Spectrum LPW2200 Electric Pressure-Washer, 170 Bar/ 2200w (Cleaning Kit Included)
description_html:
Spectrum LPW2200 Electric Pressure-Washer 2200w/170 Bar (Cleaning Kit Included)

The Spectrum LPW2200 Electric Pressure-Washer operates at up to 170 bar and produces a substantial maximum water flow rate of 450 litres per hour.

Equipped with a high-powered 2200w electric motor, this model will clean large areas fast and is capable of handling the toughest dirt- and grime-removal jobs around the house and garden.

The maximum water supply temperature is 50°C; and, as with all Spectrum Compact-Class units, the LPW2200 is fitted with convenient storage retainers for the hose, spray lance and accessories, thereby ensuring everything can be left neat and tidy and ready for the next session.

The Spectrum LPW2200 Mains-Electric Pressure Washer is suitable for a variety of uses – a quick clean of the car, a wash-down of the patio after a barbecue, or blasting dirt from the driveway – and with the ‘sheer pleasure’ that comes from using these power tools, we’re sure you’ll discover many more!

Flat, fixed, and rotary brushes are all included as standard, along with a built-in detergent tank—allowing you to use cleaning solutions for enhanced performance and more effective results.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• A top-quality pressure washer offering premium features at an affordable price
  • Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons for superior longevity
  • Integrated wheels and transport handle for easy machine movement
  • Rotating power cord holder – no need for tedious unwinding
  • Pressure/flow-rate control lets you adapt to the particular task in hand
  • Heavy-duty steel-braided hose
  • Detergent tank – add some soap into the mix when it’s needed
  • Lengthy mains cable
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons for superior longevity
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Integrated wheels and transport handle for easy machine movement

title: Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer - 1600w/ 130 Bar
description_html:
Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer – 1600w/ 130 Bar

The Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer operates at up to 130bar and produces a substantial maximum water flow-rate of 420L/hr. Equipped with a high-powered, 1600w mains-electric motor, this model will clean large areas fast and is capable of shifting the toughest dirt and grime around the house and garden.

The maximum water supply temperature is 50°C; and, as with all Compact Class units, the Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer is fitted with convenient storage retainers for the hose, spray lance and accessories, thereby ensuring everything is left neat and tidy and ready for the next session.

The Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer is suitable for an array of uses – a quick clean of the car, a wash-down of the patio after a barbecue, or blasting dirt from the driveway – and with the ‘sheer pleasure’ that comes from using these power tools, we’re sure you’ll discover many more!
